message:
fix(widgets,extras): JSON escaping correctness, O(1) diagnostic log eviction, and form style preservation

JSON Escaping:
- New diagnostics::json_string_literal() properly escapes all JSON-special
  characters including control characters (newline, carriage return, tab,
  backspace, form feed, and sub-U+0020 codepoints)
- All JSONL-producing call sites (mouse_playground DiagnosticEntry, inspector
  widget name/flag/context) updated to use it instead of hand-rolled escaping
- Round-trip tests via serde_json::from_str in each module

DiagnosticLog O(1) Amortized Eviction:
- Replace entries.remove(0) (O(n)) with head-index tracking that only drains
  the prefix when head reaches half the backing vec, giving amortized O(1)
- All accessors (entries, len, is_empty, entries_matching, to_jsonl, clear)
  adjusted for head offset
- Test verifies correct ordering after 16 insertions into 3-entry-max log

Form Rendering Style Preservation:
- draw_str now reads existing cell from buffer before overwriting, preserving
  attributes like background color already applied
- Fixes confirm dialog selected buttons losing their base background color
- Test renders ConfirmDialog with explicit base/selected colors and asserts both

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
